summary: Add editable cell notes to DFM Ratios tables.
details: Users can right-click cells in the main ratio table or average-formula summary table to add or clear notes, hover cells with markers to edit notes in a floating note box, and save those notes in the local DFM method JSON.
Saved cell notes now use the displayed row and development-column labels instead of zero-based cell indexes, while older index-keyed notes still load.
DFM RPC bridge now imports ResQ CellNotes string output into ArcRho cell notes for remote-to-local sync and shows cell-note entries in the sync comparison.
The Python API can set and clear DFM summary-table cell notes, and the Apply Growth Adjustments macro marks the selected average cells before writing adjusted user ratios.
